title: Client Testimonials | Growthik Media
description: What our clients in Real Estate and Healthcare say about us.

sections.heading: Voices from the Ground.
sections.content: TestimonialsVoices from the Ground.Read genuine thoughts from Founders and Sales Heads scaling through Growthik's integrations.Leave a ReviewReal Partnerships. Real Results.Our clients aren't just names in a spreadsheet; they are partners in growth. We focus on building long-term relationships with businesses across Pune, helping them navigate the complexities of digital acquisition."Growthik Media isn't like other agencies. They think like business owners, not just marketers. Their technical depth and transparency are what set them apart in the Pune market."138+ Five-Star ReviewsAcross Google Business, Clutch and direct client feedback surveys. We maintain a 4.9/5 average rating by focusing on lead quality and technical performance.Video Testimonial PipelineWe are currently finalizing a series of video case studies featuring founders from Baner, Hinjewadi and Wakad. These "deep-dive" testimonials will showcase the exact workflows used to achieve their scaling milestones.
